title: Auto-Torches
description: Auto Torch automatically places torches in dark areas around the player if torches are in the inventory. It helps keep surroundings lit without needing to hold a torch, making exploration safer and easier.
body: Auto Torch is a Minecraft mod that automatically places torches in dark areas near the player. It checks the light level every 5 seconds and places a torch if the light is too low, using torches from the player's inventory without requiring them to hold one. This keeps your surroundings well-lit and safe.
